chunks.transcript_text: In this segment we define data engineering and explain why reliable pipelines are the foundation of analytics products.
The host emphasizes batch and streaming patterns and how orchestration tools help teams avoid fragile ad hoc scripts.
The conversation shifts to data quality and observability, including lineage, alerts, and ownership between platform and analytics teams.
The guests close with practical advice: start with clear contracts, monitor freshness, and prioritize business outcomes over tool hype.
